{{Quote|The tragic incident that occurred last year was the act of a single man, and not a volley launched between competitive rivals, as some of my slanderous colleagues surmised.|Senator Tikkes|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Lasro Javeq''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] who was responsible for the explosion of a [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] freighter at the [[Baobab Merchant Fleet Complex]] on [[Manda/Legends|Manda]]. Javeq's freighter, berthed at the Baobab docking bays, suffered a catastrophic reactor feedback failure that [[Death/Legends|killed]] over 2,000 employees and grounded 125 [[Baobab Merchant Fleet|Baobab Merchant]] [[Starship/Legends|vessels]].<ref name="HNN" />

As the company's [[Junior Operations Manager]], Javeq had been embezzling from XTS during his five years with the company, as much as five million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. His profile revealed that he had had many psychological instabilities, and his act was deemed a suicide. After his death, [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] donated five million credits to charities that supported victims of the explosion, which included Javeq's [[Lasro Javeq's wife|widow]] and two children.<ref name="HNN" />
